---
## First run: python xlsx_to_yml.py to convert publications.xlsx to publications.yml
## then run quarto render to generate the publications.html file, need pub-listing.ejs and pub-listing.css in the same folder
title: "Publications"
description-meta: "Information, PDFs, and social metrics of papers"
title-block-banner: false
listing:
  - id: selected-work
    contents: publications.yml
    type: custom
    page-size: 100
    categories: numbered
    template: pub-listing.ejs
    include:
      section: "Selected Work"
  - id: peer-reviewed
    contents: publications.yml
    type: custom
    page-size: 100
    categories: numbered
    template: pub-listing.ejs
    include:
      section: "Peer-reviewed Journal Paper"
css: pub-listing.css
filters: [remove-stray-divfence.lua]  # This filter is used to remove stray ":::" strings that leak into the HTML output when Quarto's listing wrapper fenced divs are interrupted by raw HTML blocks from the EJS template.
---

{{< include /files/includes/_academic.qmd >}}

Note: \* corresponding author; ![](https://drganghe.github.io/files/images/highly-cited-paper-badge.png "ESI Highly Cited Paper"){width=20 fig-alt="Highly cited paper"} ESI [Highly Cited Paper](https://webofscience.help.clarivate.com/en-us/Content/esi-highly-cited-papers.html) (top 1%); ![](https://drganghe.github.io/files/images/hot-paper-badge.png "ESI Hot Paper"){width=20 fig-alt="Hot paper"} ESI [Hot Paper](https://webofscience.help.clarivate.com/en-us/Content/esi-hot-papers.html) (top 0.1%)



## Selected Work

::: {#selected-work}
:::

## Peer-reviewed Journal Papers

::: {#peer-reviewed}
:::


{{< include /files/includes/_socialshare.qmd >}}
